title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Given two strings A and B, find the length of their longest common subsequence (LCS). A subsequence does not need to be contiguous.
inputSpec: Two lines, each containing a string.

botCodes.code: let()=let a=read_line() and b=read_line() in let m=String.length a and n=String.length b in let dp=Array.make_matrix(m+1)(n+1)0 in for i=1 to m do for j=1 to n do dp.(i).(j)<-if a.[i-1]=b.[j-1] then dp.(i-1).(j-1)+1 else max dp.(i-1).(j) dp.(i).(j-1) done done;Printf.printf"%d\n" dp.(m).(n)
